subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out about the collaboration opportunity! We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call next week. We have availability on Tuesday (April 1) between 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM UTC or Thursday (April 3) between 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM UTC. Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, or suggest an alternative if none of these slots fit.

Regarding the contact directory and executive contact details: our company policy does not allow us to share internal contact information externally. When we schedule the call, we'll make sure the appropriate team members are included, and you'll have the chance to connect with our technical leads directly during the discussion.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,
[Your Assistant]
